equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-04-28 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 20.74
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-04-28: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 20.74/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. A positive 5-session S&P move also added equity relief. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-04-28, the score printed 20.74/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work. Equities also provided visible relief through a positive 5-session move.
